notes:
vMLX 1.5.40

Highlights:
- Native MTP now honors validated vmlx_mtp_tuning.json model-local depth before falling back to D3.
- Qwen3.6-27B-MXFP4-MTP launches with the measured D2 policy by default, while explicit UI/CLI overrides still win.
- Unvalidated native-MTP profiles and Qwen3.6 JANG_2K diagnostic artifacts fail closed in the app.
- Hybrid SSM cache telemetry separates live generic TurboQuant KV from stored attention-KV q4/q8 cache-boundary compression and SSM companion state.

Verification:
- Packaged app release gate passed with Qwen3.6-27B-MXFP4-MTP: GUI launch, OpenAI Chat, Responses, Anthropic, Ollama, multi-turn recall, cross-request cache hit, cache stats, and soft wake.
- Focused packaged media/speed gate passed: native MTP D2 text+VL, red image, red video, no-media followups, deep sleep/wake reload, and a 260-token count row at 50.78 wall tok/s with 171/174 accepted draft tokens.
- DMG signed, notarized, stapled, and accepted by Gatekeeper as Notarized Developer ID.
